user.title: WAPDA Monitor
user.description: Enter your 14-digit WAPDA reference number (printed on your electricity bill).

data_description.reference: The 14-digit consumer reference number printed on your WAPDA electricity bill. This is used to fetch feeder status, billing, and schedule data from the Roshan Pakistan portal.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure WAPDA Monitor
reconfigure.description: Update the reference number for this integration entry.

data_description.reference: The new 14-digit consumer reference number to use for this entry.

error.invalid_reference: Invalid reference number — must be exactly 14 digits and belong to a valid WAPDA account.
error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to the Roshan Pakistan server. Check your internet connection.
error.unknown: An unexpected error occurred. Check Home Assistant logs for details.

abort.already_configured: This reference number is already configured.

init.title: Polling Intervals
init.description: Adjust how often each data type is refreshed from the Roshan Pakistan server.

data_description.scan_interval_load: How often to poll real-time feeder status (voltage, current, power). Minimum 60 seconds, maximum 3600 seconds.
data_description.scan_interval_bill: How often to refresh billing and net metering data. Minimum 3600 seconds (1 hour), maximum 86400 seconds (24 hours).
data_description.scan_interval_schedule: How often to refresh the load shedding schedule. Minimum 300 seconds (5 minutes), maximum 7200 seconds (2 hours).
